bus.name: First Mile
bus.description:
**First Mile** owns the customer-facing experience from initial interest through contract signing.

Covers entitlement, financing, design, sales, franchise origination, contract execution, and ongoing franchise licensing (4–8% royalty on franchisee sales for brand, marketing, and sales support).

functions.name: Entitlement / Permit
functions.description: Securing land entitlements, zoning approvals, and building permits.

functions.name: Finance
functions.description: Construction loans, end-consumer mortgages, and financing coordination.

functions.name: Design
functions.description: Home design selection and customization with the buyer.

functions.name: Franchise Sales
functions.description: Originating new franchise deals. One-time fee of $650K–$950K per franchise depending on size/complexity. External revenue — paid by new franchisee.

functions.name: Licensing / Royalties
functions.description:
Ongoing 4–8% royalty on franchisee home sales volume, in exchange for brand, marketing, and sales support. Paid by franchisees (who operate Last Mile) to First Mile. **Inter-BU flow — eliminates in consolidation.**

Revenue here should be entered as annual $K expected from all franchisees. Last Mile books a matching COGS line.

functions.name: Building Contracts
functions.description: Contract execution and buyer handoff to construction.

bus.name: FBX Core
bus.description:
**FBX Core** is the industrial middle — the factory and distribution layer.

Imports components, runs warehousing, assembles Kits of Parts, trains operators, runs R&D, distributes to assembly factories, and sells components (SIP panels, bath/kitchen pods) à la carte to external buyers.

functions.name: Import (Foreign & Domestic)
functions.description: Sourcing components from domestic and international suppliers.

functions.name: Kit of Parts Creation
functions.description: Assembling components into shippable Kits of Parts. Sold to Last Mile at transfer price. **Inter-BU flow — eliminates in consolidation.**

functions.name: Component Sales (SIP / Pods)
functions.description: Wall/roof SIP panels and bath/kitchen pods sold à la carte to external buyers (non-franchisee builders, developers). **External revenue — does not eliminate.** Will become a real line.

functions.name: Training
functions.description: Training assembly crews and franchise operators.

functions.name: Research & Development
functions.description: Product development, system improvements, new models.

functions.name: Distribution to Assembly
functions.description: Logistics from Core to assembly factories.

bus.name: Last Mile
bus.description:
**Last Mile** is the GC-led execution layer.

Assembly, delivery, site installation, and inspections. Revenue from home construction contracts paid by end buyers. Pays Core for KoP (COGS) and First Mile for ongoing licensing royalties (4–8% of sales).

functions.name: Assembly
functions.description: Factory assembly of the home from the Kit of Parts.

functions.name: Delivery Logistics
functions.description: Transport from assembly factory to the site.
